acres__structural_characteristics.name: Acres operated per farm
acres__structural_characteristics.description: The number of acres owned by the operation plus the number of acres rented from others minus the number of acres rented to others.

ten1__structural_characteristics.name: Farms by tenure: Full owner
ten1__structural_characteristics.description: The share of farms in the report column that own all of the land operated.

ten2__structural_characteristics.name: Farms by tenure: Part owner
ten2__structural_characteristics.description: The share of farms in the report column that own some of the land operated.

ten3__structural_characteristics.name: Farms by tenure: Tenant
ten3__structural_characteristics.description: The share of farms in the report column that rent all of the land operated.

opoc1__structural_characteristics.name: Operator occupation: Farming
opoc1__structural_characteristics.description: The share of farm operators in the report column that reported farming as their primary occupation

opoc2__structural_characteristics.name: Operator occupation: Something else
opoc2__structural_characteristics.description: The share of farm operators in the report column that reported something else (other than farming or retired) as their primary occupation

opoc3__structural_characteristics.name: Operator occupation: Retired from farming
opoc3__structural_characteristics.description: For most years, this is the share of principal farm operators reporting that they are retired from farming. In 1996, 1998-2001, and 2012 it is the share of farm of principal farm operators retired in general, not just from farming.

oped1__structural_characteristics.name: Operator education: Less than high school
oped1__structural_characteristics.description: The share of farm operators in the report column that did not complete high school

oped2__structural_characteristics.name: Operator education: Completed high school
oped2__structural_characteristics.description: The share of farm operators in the report column that completed high school

oped3__structural_characteristics.name: Operator education: Some college
oped3__structural_characteristics.description: The share of farm operators in the report column that completed some college (less than 4 years).

oped4__structural_characteristics.name: Operator education: Completed 4 years or more of college
oped4__structural_characteristics.description: The share of farm operators in the report column that completed 4 years or more of college.

ophr1__structural_characteristics.name: Operator hours worked annually on farm: Less than 500
ophr1__structural_characteristics.description: The share of farm operators in the report column that worked less than 500 hours on the farm

ophr2__structural_characteristics.name: Operator hours worked annually on farm: 500 to 999
ophr2__structural_characteristics.description: The share of farm operators in the report column that worked between 500 and 999 hours on the farm

ophr3__structural_characteristics.name: Operator hours worked annually on farm: 1,000 to 1,999
ophr3__structural_characteristics.description: The share of farm operators in the report column that worked between 1000 and 1,999 hours on the farm

ophr4__structural_characteristics.name: Operator hours worked annually on farm: 2,000 or more
ophr4__structural_characteristics.description: The share of farm operators in the report column that worked 2,000 hours or more on the farm.
